name: ssh-mcp-server-root
description: SSH MCP Server — AI-powered SSH/SFTP remote operations

scripts.prerelease: pnpm -r run ci && pnpm -r run build
scripts.postrelease: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; const {execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync('npm version '+v+' --no-git-tag-version', {cwd:'packages/ssh-server'}); execSync('npm version '+v+' --no-git-tag-version', {cwd:'packages/ssh-vscode-extension'}); execSync('git add packages/ssh-server/package.json packages/ssh-vscode-extension/package.json'); execSync('git commit --amend --no-edit'); execSync('git tag -f v'+v);"
